nasb.text: But pelican and hedgehog will possess it, And owl and raven will dwell in it; And He will stretch over it the line of desolation And the plumb line of emptiness.

esv.text: But the hawk and the porcupine shall possess it, the owl and the raven shall dwell in it. He shall stretch the line of confusion over it, and the plumb line of emptiness.

cnv.text: 但鵜鶘與箭豬要佔據那地， 貓頭鷹和烏鴉必住在其中。 耶和華必把混沌的準繩、 空虛的線鉈，拉在其上。

ccb.text: 鹈鹕和刺猬必占据那里， 猫头鹰和乌鸦必在那里做窝。 耶和华要用准绳和线锤丈量以东， 使它空虚混沌。

csbs.text: 鹈鹕和豪猪将占有那地， 猫头鹰和乌鸦将居住其中； 耶和华要把准绳和线砣拉在其上， 使它变得空虚混沌。
